verses.latin_vulgate: Filii autem Israël secundum numerum suum, principes familiarum, tribuni, et centuriones, et præfecti, qui ministrabant regi juxta turmas suas, ingredientes et egredientes per singulos menses in anno, viginti quatuor millibus singuli præerant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֣ל ׀ לְֽמִסְפָּרָ֡ם רָאשֵׁ֣י הָאָב֣וֹת וְשָׂרֵ֣י הָאֲלָפִ֣ים ׀ וְהַמֵּא֡וֹת וְשֹׁטְרֵיהֶם֩ הַמְשָׁרְתִ֨ים אֶת־הַמֶּ֜לֶךְ לְכֹ֣ל ׀ דְּבַ֣ר הַֽמַּחְלְק֗וֹת הַבָּאָ֤ה וְהַיֹּצֵאת֙ חֹ֣דֶשׁ בְּחֹ֔דֶשׁ לְכֹ֖ל חׇדְשֵׁ֣י הַשָּׁנָ֑ה הַֽמַּחֲלֹ֙קֶת֙ הָאַחַ֔ת עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וְאַרְבָּעָ֖ה אָֽלֶף׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Now the children of Israel according to their number, the heads of families, captains of thousands and of hundreds, and officers, that served the king according to their companies, who came in and went out every month in the year, under every chief were four and twenty thousand.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Israelin lapset heidän lukunsa jälkeen olivat: isäin päämiehet, tuhanten ja satain ruhtinaat, ja virkamiehet, jotka ottivat kuninkaasta vaarin, heidän järjestyksensä jälkeen, vaeltamaan sinne ja tänne jokainen kuukautenansa, joka kuukautena ajastajassa; ja jokaisessa joukossa oli neljäkolmattakymmentä tuhatta.
verses.king_james: Now the children of Israel after their number, to wit, the chief fathers and captains of thousands and hundreds, and their officers that served the king in any matter of the courses, which came in and went out month by month throughout all the months of the year, of every course were twenty and four thousand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Primæ turmæ in primo mense Jesboam præerat filius Zabdiel, et sub eo viginti quatuor millia ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַ֞ל הַמַּחֲלֹ֤קֶת הָרִֽאשׁוֹנָה֙ לַחֹ֣דֶשׁ הָרִאשׁ֔וֹן יָשׇׁבְעָ֖ם בֶּן־זַבְדִּיאֵ֑ל וְעַל֙ מַחֲלֻקְתּ֔וֹ עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וְאַרְבָּעָ֖ה אָֽלֶף׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Over the first company the first month Jesboam, the son of Zabdiel was chief, and under him were four and twenty thousand.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ensimäisen joukon päällä ensimäisenä kuukautena oli Jasobeam Saddielin poika, ja hänen joukossansa neljäkolmattakymmentä tuhatta.
verses.king_james: Over the first course for the first month was Jashobeam the son of Zabdiel: and in his course were twenty and four thousand.

verses.latin_vulgate: de filiis Phares, princeps cunctorum principum in exercitu mense primo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִן־בְּנֵי־פֶ֗רֶץ הָרֹ֛אשׁ לְכׇל־שָׂרֵ֥י הַצְּבָא֖וֹת לַחֹ֥דֶשׁ הָרִאשֽׁוֹן׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Of the sons of Phares, the chief of all the captains in the host in the first month.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Peretsin lapsista oli ylimmäinen kaikkein sodanpäämiesten päällä, ensimäisenä kuukautena.
verses.king_james: Of the children of Perez was the chief of all the captains of the host for the first month.

verses.latin_vulgate: Secundi mensis habebat turmam Dudia Ahohites, et post se alter nomine Macelloth, qui regebat partem exercitus viginti quatuor millium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַ֞ל מַחֲלֹ֣קֶת ׀ הַחֹ֣דֶשׁ הַשֵּׁנִ֗י דּוֹדַ֤י הָֽאֲחוֹחִי֙ וּמַ֣חֲלֻקְתּ֔וֹ וּמִקְל֖וֹת הַנָּגִ֑יד וְעַל֙ מַחֲלֻקְתּ֔וֹ עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וְאַרְבָּעָ֖ה אָֽלֶף׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The company of the second month was under Dudia, an Ahohite, and after him was another named Macelloth, who commanded a part of the army of four and twenty thousand.
verses.finnish_biblia: Toisen kuukauden joukon päällä oli Dodai Ahohilainen, ja Miklot päämies hänen joukkonsa päällä, ja hänen joukossansa neljäkolmattakymmentä tuhatta.
verses.king_james: And over the course of the second month was Dodai an Ahohite, and of his course was Mikloth also the ruler: in his course likewise were twenty and four thousand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dux quoque turmæ tertiæ in mense tertio erat Banaias filius Jojadæ sacerdos : et in divisione sua viginti quatuor millia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שַׂ֣ר הַצָּבָ֤א הַשְּׁלִישִׁי֙ לַחֹ֣דֶשׁ הַשְּׁלִישִׁ֔י בְּנָיָ֧הוּ בֶן־יְהוֹיָדָ֛ע הַכֹּהֵ֖ן רֹ֑אשׁ וְעַל֙ מַחֲלֻקְתּ֔וֹ עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וְאַרְבָּעָ֖ה אָֽלֶף׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the captain of the third company for the third month, was Banaias the son of Joiada the priest: and in his division were four and twenty thousand.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kolmannen joukon päämies kolmantena kuukautena oli Benaja papin Jojadan poika, ja hänen joukossansa oli neljäkolmattakymmentä tuhatta.
verses.king_james: The third captain of the host for the third month was Benaiah the son of Jehoiada, a chief priest: and in his course were twenty and four thousand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ipse est Banaias fortissimus inter triginta, et super triginta : præerat autem turmæ ipsius Amizabad filius ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ה֧וּא בְנָיָ֛הוּ גִּבּ֥וֹר הַשְּׁלֹשִׁ֖ים וְעַל־הַשְּׁלֹשִׁ֑ים וּמַ֣חֲלֻקְתּ֔וֹ עַמִּיזָבָ֖ד בְּנֽוֹ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: This is that Banaias the most valiant among the thirty, and above the thirty. And Amizabad his son commanded his company.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tämä on Benaja väkevä kolmenkymmenen seassa ja kolmenkymmenen päällä, ja hänen joukkonsa oli hänen poikansa Ammisabadin alla.
verses.king_james: This is that Benaiah, who was mighty among the thirty, and above the thirty: and in his course was Ammizabad his son.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quartus, mense quarto, Asahel frater Joab, et Zabadias filius ejus post eum : et in turma ejus viginti quatuor millia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָרְבִיעִ֞י לַחֹ֣דֶשׁ הָרְבִיעִ֗י עֲשָׂהאֵל֙ אֲחִ֣י יוֹאָ֔ב וּזְבַדְיָ֥ה בְנ֖וֹ אַחֲרָ֑יו וְעַל֙ מַחֲלֻקְתּ֔וֹ עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וְאַרְבָּעָ֖ה אָֽלֶף׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The fourth, for the fourth month, was Asahel the brother of Joab, and Zabadias his son after him: and in his company were four and twenty thousand.
verses.finnish_biblia: Neljäs, neljäntenä kuukautena, oli Asahel Joabin veli, ja hänen jälkeensä Sebadia hänen poikansa, ja hänen joukossansa neljäkolmattakymmentä tuhatta.
verses.king_james: The fourth captain for the fourth month was Asahel the brother of Joab, and Zebadiah his son after him: and in his course were twenty and four thousand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quintus, mense quinto, princeps Samaoth Jezerites : et in turma ejus viginti quatuor millia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַחֲמִישִׁי֙ לַחֹ֣דֶשׁ הַחֲמִישִׁ֔י הַשַּׂ֖ר שַׁמְה֣וּת הַיִּזְרָ֑ח וְעַל֙ מַחֲלֻקְתּ֔וֹ עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וְאַרְבָּעָ֖ה אָֽלֶף׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The fifth captain for the fifth month, was Samaoth a Jezerite: and his company were four and twenty thousand.
verses.finnish_biblia: Viides, viidentenä kuukautena, oli päämies Samehut Jesrahilainen, ja hänen joukossansa oli neljäkolmattakymmentä tuhatta.
verses.king_james: The fifth captain for the fifth month was Shamhuth the Izrahite: and in his course were twenty and four thousand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sextus, mense sexto, Hira filius Acces Thecuites : et in turma ejus viginti quatuor millia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַשִּׁשִּׁי֙ לַחֹ֣דֶשׁ הַשִּׁשִּׁ֔י עִירָ֥א בֶן־עִקֵּ֖שׁ הַתְּקוֹעִ֑י וְעַל֙ מַחֲלֻקְתּ֔וֹ עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וְאַרְבָּעָ֖ה אָֽלֶף׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The sixth, for the sixth month, was Hira the son of Acces a Thecuite: and in his company were four and twenty thousand.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuudes, kuudentena kuukautena, oli Ira Ikeksen Thekoalaisen poika, ja hänen joukossansa oli neljäkolmattakymmentä tuhatta.
verses.king_james: The sixth captain for the sixth month was Ira the son of Ikkesh the Tekoite: and in his course were twenty and four thousand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Septimus, mense septimo, Helles Phallonites de filiis Ephraim : et in turma ejus viginti quatuor millia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַשְּׁבִיעִי֙ לַחֹ֣דֶשׁ הַשְּׁבִיעִ֔י חֶ֥לֶץ הַפְּלוֹנִ֖י מִן־בְּנֵ֣י אֶפְרָ֑יִם וְעַל֙ מַחֲלֻקְתּ֔וֹ עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וְאַרְבָּעָ֖ה אָֽלֶף׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The seventh, for the seventh month, was Helles a Phallonite of the sons of Ephraim: and in his company were four and twenty thousand.
verses.finnish_biblia: Seitsemäs, seitsemäntenä kuukautena, oli Heles Pelonilainen Ephraimin lapsia, ja hänen joukossansa oli neljäkolmattakymmentä tuhatta.
verses.king_james: The seventh captain for the seventh month was Helez the Pelonite, of the children of Ephraim: and in his course were twenty and four thousand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Octavus, mense octavo, Sobochai Husathites de stirpe Zarahi : et in turma ejus viginti quatuor millia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַשְּׁמִינִי֙ לַחֹ֣דֶשׁ הַשְּׁמִינִ֔י סִבְּכַ֥י הַחֻשָׁתִ֖י לַזַּרְחִ֑י וְעַל֙ מַחֲלֻקְתּ֔וֹ עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וְאַרְבָּעָ֖ה אָֽלֶף׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The eighth, for the eighth month, was Sobochai a Husathite of the race of Zarahi: and in his company were four and twenty thousand.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kahdeksas, kahdeksantena kuukautena, oli Sibbekai Hussatilainen Sarhilaisista, ja hänen joukossansa oli neljäkolmattakymmentä tuhatta.
verses.king_james: The eighth captain for the eighth month was Sibbecai the Hushathite, of the Zarhites: and in his course were twenty and four thousand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nonus, mense nono, Abiezer Anathothites de filiis Jemini : et in turma ejus viginti quatuor millia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַתְּשִׁיעִי֙ לַחֹ֣דֶשׁ הַתְּשִׁיעִ֔י אֲבִיעֶ֥זֶר הָעַנְּתוֹתִ֖י (לבנימיני) [לַבֵּ֣ן ׀ יְמִינִ֑י] וְעַל֙ מַחֲלֻקְתּ֔וֹ עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וְאַרְבָּעָ֖ה אָֽלֶף׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The ninth, for the ninth month, was Abiezer an Anathothite of the sons of Jemini, and in his company were four and twenty thousand.
verses.finnish_biblia: Yhdeksäs, yhdeksäntenä kuukautena, oli Abieser Antotilainen Jeminin lapsista, ja hänen joukossansa oli neljäkolmattakymmentä tuhatta.
verses.king_james: The ninth captain for the ninth month was Abiezer the Anetothite, of the Benjamites: and in his course were twenty and four thousand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Decimus, mense decimo, Marai, et ipse Netophathites de stirpe Zarai : et in turma ejus viginti quatuor millia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָעֲשִׂירִי֙ לַחֹ֣דֶשׁ הָעֲשִׂירִ֔י מַהְרַ֥י הַנְּטוֹפָתִ֖י לַזַּרְחִ֑י וְעַל֙ מַחֲלֻקְתּ֔וֹ עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וְאַרְבָּעָ֖ה אָֽלֶף׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The tenth, for the tenth month, was Marai, who was a Netophathite of the race of Zarai: and in his company were four and twenty thousand.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kymmenes, kymmenentenä kuukautena, oli Maherai Netophatilainen Sarhilaisista, ja hänen joukossansa oli neljäkolmattakymmentä tuhatta.
verses.king_james: The tenth captain for the tenth month was Maharai the Netophathite, of the Zarhites: and in his course were twenty and four thousand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Undecimus, mense undecimo, Banaias Pharathonites de filiis Ephraim : et in turma ejus viginti quatuor millia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַשְׁתֵּֽי־עָשָׂר֙ לְעַשְׁתֵּ֣י עָשָׂ֣ר הַחֹ֔דֶשׁ בְּנָיָ֥ה הַפִּרְעָתוֹנִ֖י מִן־בְּנֵ֣י אֶפְרָ֑יִם וְעַל֙ מַחֲלֻקְתּ֔וֹ עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וְאַרְבָּעָ֖ה אָֽלֶף׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The eleventh, for the eleventh month, was Banaias, a Pharathonite of the sons of Ephraim: and in his company were four and twenty thousand.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ensimäinentoistakymmentä, ensimäisenä kuukautena toistakymmentä, oli Benaja Pirtagonilainen Ephraimin lapsista, ja hänen joukossansa oli neljäkolmattakymmentä tuhatta.
verses.king_james: The eleventh captain for the eleventh month was Benaiah the Pirathonite, of the children of Ephraim: and in his course were twenty and four thousand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Duodecimus, mense duodecimo, Holdai Netophathites, de stirpe Gothoniel : et in turma ejus viginti quatuor millia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַשְּׁנֵ֤ים עָשָׂר֙ לִשְׁנֵ֣ים עָשָׂ֣ר הַחֹ֔דֶשׁ חֶלְדַּ֥י הַנְּטוֹפָתִ֖י לְעׇתְנִיאֵ֑ל וְעַל֙ מַחֲלֻקְתּ֔וֹ עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וְאַרְבָּעָ֖ה אָֽלֶף׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: The twelfth, for the twelfth month, was Holdai a Netophathite, of the race of Gothoniel: and in his company were four and twenty thousand.
verses.finnish_biblia: Toinentoistakymmentä, toisena kuukautena toistakymmentä, oli Heldai Netophatilainen Otnielista, ja hänen joukossansa neljäkolmattakymmentä tuhatta.
verses.king_james: The twelfth captain for the twelfth month was Heldai the Netophathite, of Othniel: and in his course were twenty and four thousand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro tribubus præerant Israël, Rubenitis, dux Eliezer filius Zechri : Simeonitis, dux Saphatias filius Maacha :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַל֙ שִׁבְטֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל לָראוּבֵנִ֣י נָגִ֔יד אֱלִיעֶ֖זֶר בֶּן־זִכְרִ֑י {ס} לַשִּׁ֨מְעוֹנִ֔י שְׁפַטְיָ֖הוּ בֶּֽן־מַעֲכָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Now the chiefs over the tribes of Israel were these: over the Rubenites, Eliezer the son of Zechri was ruler: over the Simeonites, Saphatias the son of Maacha:
verses.finnish_biblia: Israelin sukukuntain päällä: Rubenilaisten päämies oli Elieser Sikrin poika; Simeonilaisten seassa Sephatia Maekan poika;
verses.king_james: Furthermore over the tribes of Israel: the ruler of the Reubenites was Eliezer the son of Zichri: of the Simeonites, Shephatiah the son of Maachah:

verses.latin_vulgate: Levitis, Hasabias filius Camuel : Aaronitis, Sadoc :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְלֵוִ֛י חֲשַׁבְיָ֥ה בֶן־קְמוּאֵ֖ל לְאַהֲרֹ֥ן צָדֽוֹק׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Over the Levites, Hasabias the son of Camuel: over the Aaronites, Sadoc:
verses.finnish_biblia: Leviläisten seassa, Hasabia Kemuelin poika; Aronilaisten seassa Zadok;
verses.king_james: Of the Levites, Hashabiah the son of Kemuel: of the Aaronites, Zadok:

verses.latin_vulgate: Juda, Eliu frater David : Issachar, Amri filius Michaël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִיהוּדָ֕ה אֱלִיה֖וּ מֵאֲחֵ֣י דָוִ֑יד {ס} לְיִ֨שָּׂשכָ֔ר עׇמְרִ֖י בֶּן־מִיכָאֵֽל׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Over Juda, Eliu the brother of David over Issachar, Amri the son of Michael:
verses.finnish_biblia: Juudan seassa, Elihu Davidin veljistä; Isaskarin seassa, Omri Mikaelin poika;
verses.king_james: Of Judah, Elihu, one of the brethren of David: of Issachar, Omri the son of Michael:

verses.latin_vulgate: Zabulonitis, Jesmaias filius Abdiæ : Nephthalitibus, Jerimoth filius Ozriel :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִזְבוּלֻ֕ן יִֽשְׁמַעְיָ֖הוּ בֶּן־עֹבַדְיָ֑הוּ {ס} לְנַ֨פְתָּלִ֔י יְרִימ֖וֹת בֶּן־עַזְרִיאֵֽל׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Over the Zabulonites, Jesmaias the son of Adias: over the Nephtalites, Jerimoth the son of Ozriel:
verses.finnish_biblia: Sebulonin seassa, Jismaja Obadian poika; Naphtalin seassa, Jerimot Asrielin poika;
verses.king_james: Of Zebulun, Ishmaiah the son of Obadiah: of Naphtali, Jerimoth the son of Azriel:

verses.latin_vulgate: filiis Ephraim, Osee filius Ozaziu : dimidiæ tribui Manasse, Joël filius Phadaiæ :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לִבְנֵ֣י אֶפְרַ֔יִם הוֹשֵׁ֖עַ בֶּן־עֲזַזְיָ֑הוּ לַֽחֲצִי֙ שֵׁ֣בֶט מְנַשֶּׁ֔ה יוֹאֵ֖ל בֶּן־פְּדָיָֽהוּ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Over the sons of Ephraim, Osee the son of Ozaziu: over the half tribe of Manasses, Joel the son of Phadaia:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ephraimin lasten seassa, Hosea Asasian poika; puolen Manassen sukukunnan seassa, Joel Pedajan poika;
verses.king_james: Of the children of Ephraim, Hoshea the son of Azaziah: of the half tribe of Manasseh, Joel the son of Pedaiah:

verses.latin_vulgate: et dimidiæ tribui Manasse in Galaad, Jaddo filius Zachariæ : Benjamin autem, Jasiel filius Abner :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לַֽחֲצִ֤י הַֽמְנַשֶּׁה֙ גִּלְעָ֔דָה יִדּ֖וֹ בֶּן־זְכַרְיָ֑הוּ {ס} לְבִ֨נְיָמִ֔ן יַעֲשִׂיאֵ֖ל בֶּן־אַבְנֵֽר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And over the half tribe of Manasses in Galaad, Jaddo the son of Zacharias: and over Benjamin, Jasiel the son of Abner.
verses.finnish_biblia: Puolen Manassen sukukunnan seassa Gileadissa, Jiddo Sakarian poika; BenJaminin seassa, Jaasiel Abnerin poika;
verses.king_james: Of the half tribe of Manasseh in Gilead, Iddo the son of Zechariah: of Benjamin, Jaasiel the son of Abner:

verses.latin_vulgate: Dan vero, Ezrihel filius Jeroham : hi principes filiorum Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְדָ֕ן עֲזַרְאֵ֖ל בֶּן־יְרֹחָ֑ם אֵ֕לֶּה שָׂרֵ֖י שִׁבְטֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And over Dan, Ezrihel the son of Jeroham: these were the princes of the children of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Danin seassa, Asareel Jerohamin poika. Nämät ovat Israelin sukukuntain päämiehet.
verses.king_james: Of Dan, Azareel the son of Jeroham. These were the princes of the tribes of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Noluit autem David numerare eos a viginti annis inferius : quia dixerat Dominus ut multiplicaret Israël quasi stellas cæli.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֹֽא־נָשָׂ֤א דָוִיד֙ מִסְפָּרָ֔ם לְמִבֶּ֛ן עֶשְׂרִ֥ים שָׁנָ֖ה וּלְמָ֑טָּה כִּ֚י אָמַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֔ה לְהַרְבּ֥וֹת אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל כְּכוֹכְבֵ֥י הַשָּׁמָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: But David would not number them from twenty years old and under: because the lord had said that he would multiply Israel like the stars of heaven.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta David ei lukenut niitä, jotka kahdenkymmenen vuotiset ja sitä nuoremmat olivat; sillä Herra oli luvannut enentää Israelin niinkuin tähdet taivaissa.
verses.king_james: But David took not the number of them from twenty years old and under: because the Lord had said he would increase Israel like to the stars of the heavens.

verses.latin_vulgate: Joab filius Sarviæ cœperat numerare, nec complevit : quia super hoc ira irruerat in Israël, et idcirco numerus eorum qui fuerant recensiti, non est relatus in fastos regis David.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יוֹאָ֨ב בֶּן־צְרוּיָ֜ה הֵחֵ֤ל לִמְנוֹת֙ וְלֹ֣א כִלָּ֔ה וַיְהִ֥י בָזֹ֛את קֶ֖צֶף עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וְלֹ֤א עָלָה֙ הַמִּסְפָּ֔ר בְּמִסְפַּ֥ר דִּבְרֵֽי־הַיָּמִ֖ים לַמֶּ֥לֶךְ דָּוִֽיד׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Joab the son of Sarvia began to number, but he finished not: because upon this there fell wrath upon Israel: and therefore the number of them that were numbered, was not registered in the chronicles of king David.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Joab Zerujan poika oli ruvennut lukemaan ja ei sitä täyttänyt, ja viha tuli siitä Israelin päälle: ja ei se luku tullut kuningas Davidin aikakirjaan.
verses.king_james: Joab the son of Zeruiah began to number, but he finished not, because there fell wrath for it against Israel; neither was the number put in the account of the chronicles of king David.

verses.latin_vulgate: Super thesauros autem regis fuit Azmoth filius Adiel : his autem thesauris, qui erant in urbibus, et in vicis, et in turribus, præsidebat Jonathan filius Oziæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַל֙ אֹצְר֣וֹת הַמֶּ֔לֶךְ עַזְמָ֖וֶת בֶּן־עֲדִיאֵ֑ל {ס} וְעַ֣ל הָאֹצָר֡וֹת בַּשָּׂדֶ֞ה בֶּֽעָרִ֤ים וּבַכְּפָרִים֙ וּבַמִּגְדָּל֔וֹת יְהוֹנָתָ֖ן בֶּן־עֻזִּיָּֽהוּ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And over the king's treasures was Azmoth the son of Adiel: and over those stores which were in the cities, and in the villages, and, in the castles, was Jonathan the son of Ozias.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuninkaan tavarain päällä oli Asmavet Adielin poika, ja tavarain päällä, jotka olivat maalla, kaupungeissa, kylissä ja linnoissa, oli Jonatan Ussian poika.
verses.king_james: And over the king’s treasures was Azmaveth the son of Adiel: and over the storehouses in the fields, in the cities, and in the villages, and in the castles, was Jehonathan the son of Uzziah:

verses.latin_vulgate: Operi autem rustico, et agricolis qui exercebant terram, præerat Ezri filius Chelub :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַ֗ל עֹשֵׂי֙ מְלֶ֣אכֶת הַשָּׂדֶ֔ה לַעֲבֹדַ֖ת הָאֲדָמָ֑ה עֶזְרִ֖י בֶּן־כְּלֽוּב׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And over the tillage, and the husbandmen, who tilled the ground, was Ezri the son of Chelub:
verses.finnish_biblia: Talonpoikain päällä, jotka maata viljelivät, oli Esri Kelubin poika.
verses.king_james: And over them that did the work of the field for tillage of the ground was Ezri the son of Chelub:

verses.latin_vulgate: vinearumque cultoribus, Semeias Romathites : cellis autem vinariis, Zabdias Aphonites.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַ֨ל־הַכְּרָמִ֔ים שִׁמְעִ֖י הָרָמָתִ֑י {ס} וְעַ֤ל שֶׁבַּכְּרָמִים֙ לְאֹצְר֣וֹת הַיַּ֔יִן זַבְדִּ֖י הַשִּׁפְמִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And over the dressers of the vine yards, was Semeias a Romathite: and over the wine cellars, Zabdias an Aphonite.
verses.finnish_biblia: Viinamäkein päällä oli Simei Ramalainen; viinakellarein ja viinatavarain päällä Sabdi Siphmiläinen.
verses.king_james: And over the vineyards was Shimei the Ramathite: over the increase of the vineyards for the wine cellars was Zabdi the Shiphmite:

verses.latin_vulgate: Nam super oliveta et ficeta quæ erant in campestribus, Balanam Gederites : super apothecas autem olei, Joas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַל־הַזֵּיתִ֤ים וְהַשִּׁקְמִים֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר בַּשְּׁפֵלָ֔ה בַּ֥עַל חָנָ֖ן הַגְּדֵרִ֑י {ס} וְעַל־אֹצְר֥וֹת הַשֶּׁ֖מֶן יוֹעָֽשׁ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And over the oliveyards and the fig groves, which were in the plains, was Balanam a Gederite: and over the oil cellars, Joas.
verses.finnish_biblia: Öljypuiden ja metsäfikunapuiden päällä, jotka olivat laaksossa, oli BaalHanan Gadarilainen; öljytavarain päällä Joas.
verses.king_james: And over the olive trees and the sycomore trees that were in the low plains was Baal–hanan the Gederite: and over the cellars of oil was Joash:

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro armentis quæ pascebantur in Saron, præpositus fuit Setrai Saronites : et super boves in vallibus, Saphat filius Adli :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַל־הַבָּקָר֙ הָרֹעִ֣ים בַּשָּׁר֔וֹן (שטרי) [שִׁרְטַ֖י] הַשָּׁרוֹנִ֑י {ס} וְעַל־הַבָּקָר֙ בָּעֲמָקִ֔ים שָׁפָ֖ט בֶּן־עַדְלָֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And over the herds that fed in Saron, was Setrai a Saronite: and over the oxen in the valleys, Saphat the son of Adli:
verses.finnish_biblia: Laidunhärkäin päällä Saronissa oli Sitrai Saronilainen; mutta härkäin päällä laaksossa Saphat Adlain poika;
verses.king_james: And over the herds that fed in Sharon was Shitrai the Sharonite: and over the herds that were in the valleys was Shaphat the son of Adlai:

verses.latin_vulgate: super camelos vero, Ubil Ismahelites : et super asinos, Jadias Meronathites :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַ֨ל־הַגְּמַלִּ֔ים אוֹבִ֖יל הַיִּשְׁמְעֵלִ֑י {ס} וְעַל־הָ֣אֲתֹנ֔וֹת יֶחְדְּיָ֖הוּ הַמֵּרֹנֹתִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And over the camels, Ubil an Ishmahelite and over the asses, Jadias a Meronathite:
verses.finnish_biblia: Kamelein päällä Obil Ismaelilainen; aasein päällä Jehedia Meronotilainen;
verses.king_james: Over the camels also was Obil the Ishmaelite: and over the asses was Jehdeiah the Meronothite:

verses.latin_vulgate: super oves quoque, Jaziz Agareus : omnes hi, principes substantiæ regis David.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעַל־הַצֹּ֖אן יָזִ֣יז הַהַגְרִ֑י כׇּל־אֵ֙לֶּה֙ שָׂרֵ֣י הָרְכ֔וּשׁ אֲשֶׁ֖ר לַמֶּ֥לֶךְ דָּוִֽיד׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And over the sheep Jaziz an Agarene. All these were the rulers of the substance of king David.
verses.finnish_biblia: Lammasten päällä Jasis Hagarilainen: nämät kaikki olivat päämiehet kuningas Davidin omaisuuden päällä.
verses.king_james: And over the flocks was Jaziz the Hagerite. All these were the rulers of the substance which was king David’s.

verses.latin_vulgate: Jonathan autem patruus David, consiliarius, vir prudens et litteratus : ipse et Jahiel filius Hachamoni erant cum filiis regis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וִיהוֹנָתָ֤ן דּוֹד־דָּוִיד֙ יוֹעֵ֔ץ אִישׁ־מֵבִ֥ין וְסוֹפֵ֖ר ה֑וּא וִיחִיאֵ֥ל בֶּן־חַכְמוֹנִ֖י עִם־בְּנֵ֥י הַמֶּֽלֶךְ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Jonathan David's uncle, a counsellor, a wise and learned man: he and Jahiel the son of Hachamoni were with the king's sons.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Davidin setä Jonatan oli neuvonantaja, toimellinen mies ja hyvin oppinut. Jehiel Hakmonin poika oli kuninkaan lasten tykönä.
verses.king_james: Also Jonathan David’s uncle was a counsellor, a wise man, and a scribe: and Jehiel the son of Hachmoni was with the king’s sons:

verses.latin_vulgate: Achitophel etiam consiliarius regis, et Chusai Arachites amicus regis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲחִיתֹ֖פֶל יוֹעֵ֣ץ לַמֶּ֑לֶךְ וְחוּשַׁ֥י הָאַרְכִּ֖י רֵ֥עַ הַמֶּֽלֶךְ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Achitophel was the king's counsellor, and Chusai the Arachite, the king's friend.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ahitophel oli myös kuninkaan neuvonantaja; Husai Arkilainen oli kuninkaan ystävä.
verses.king_james: And Ahithophel was the king’s counsellor: and Hushai the Archite was the king’s companion:

verses.latin_vulgate: Post Achitophel fuit Jojada filius Banaiæ, et Abiathar. Princeps autem exercitus regis erat Joab.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַחֲרֵ֣י אֲחִיתֹ֗פֶל יְהוֹיָדָ֤ע בֶּן־בְּנָיָ֙הוּ֙ וְאֶבְיָתָ֔ר וְשַׂר־צָבָ֥א לַמֶּ֖לֶךְ יוֹאָֽב׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And after Achitophel was Joiada the son of Banaias, and Abiathar. And the general of the king's army was Joab.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Ahitophelin jälkeen oli Jojada Benajan poika ja Ebjatar. Mutta Joab oli kuninkaan sodan päämies.
verses.king_james: And after Ahithophel was Jehoiada the son of Benaiah, and Abiathar: and the general of the king’s army was Joab.
